title: Distant Creations
description: Explore a beautiful world using Create and Distant Horizons!
body:
![Distant Creations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9745684db52a01917eda89231d34d201d66e8e05.png) _
A relaxed, visually striking modpack focused around create and exploring a beautiful world
_
![Blunthorn Page break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b35ad491cb7c641a9a4d5960081071132c31ea6f.png)
### Video Placeholder
![Blunthorn Page break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b35ad491cb7c641a9a4d5960081071132c31ea6f.png)
### _A new adventure awaits_
- **Explore** a Minecraft world with striking visuals and numerous structures using immersive aircrafts. - **Gear up** with Medieval Weaponry and unravel the mysteries of _runic stones_ scattered throughout the world. - **Store** your gear in Sophisticated Backpacks and Tom's simple storage. - **Build** yourself a home with an extended block pallet from rechiseled and chipped. - **Decorate** this home with Handcrafted furniture and other decoration blocks. - **Conquer** the Better Nether and Better End. - **Make** the world your own using Create and its multiple add-ons. - **Train** your dog, customize him and take him on adventures!
![Blunthorn Page break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b35ad491cb7c641a9a4d5960081071132c31ea6f.png)
### FAQ
Multiplayer **Q:** Does Distant Creations support Multiplayer?

**A:** Yes, you can either host your own Server or utilise the built-in mod World Host!
Performance/Shaders **Q:** The game is not running well, what can I do?

**A:** First and foremost, depending on your computer, change the Distant Horizon Settings. By default, they are set to a pretty high view distance, so that should be the first change. Afterwards, the LOD quality setting can have a big impact as well. Finally, consider changing the Shaders. By default the modpack comes with BSL and Complimentary Reimagined installed. If you wish to install other shaders, check their compability with Distant Horizons [here](https://gist.github.com/Steveplays28/52db568f297ded527da56dbe6deeec0e).
Help/Bug Reports **Q:** Where can I ask for help or report bugs?

**A:** Head over to the blunthorn [Discord](https://discord.gg/8z63AhuDZg)
[![Blunthorn Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33bd81aa6ae82fa38ca94fa6bcfc55562920de23.png)](https://discord.gg/8z63AhuDZg)
